Oh nice congrats!

You can try Fauxborn Murphy Caecus w/ Castor or Hameln or Goliath, or Thais.

Murphy Exalt is to survive one extra turn. Her 0 cost can be used for more Sacrifice on self(which is more Dmg for Fauxborn), Shielding, or 1 Arith off from Combos. Her 3 cost can lower self Sacrifice and has Retain, w/ Weak App.

Caecus Exalt for Burst Turn for Vuln App w/ Fauxborn. Everything else doesn’t matter much.

Rouse Fauxborn before Exalt w/ Red Stance. Make sure you have 3 cost in hand. 

Castor can be used for huge amounts of shielding w/ Exalt and “Onyx Plume” Retain, and Weak App on 2 cost. His 3 cost is only played with Plume reduction from E2. You should apply Corrosive with Plumes before Fauxborn Exalt and 3 cost, just like Caecus Exalt before Fauxborn burst.

Hameln Rouse and Exalt can make you double, or triple play a card, in this case Fauxborn 3 cost during Burst Turns. Hamlen 3 cost is nice draw power as well to find Fauxborn 3 cost.

Goliath works in the sense he gives you fuck ton of Temp Str(100s of) when you use his “Usurp” Exalt because it scales off of Tent Dmg(switch to Red Stance before Goli Exalt), which is used in tandem with Fauxborn Burst Turn. Since Goli is a Lemurian, his Exalt also gives a ton of Shield due to Fauxborn Soulforge.

Thais can battery Fauxborn for more Exalts, stacking Sacrifice. She is very flexible as well with her Vuln or Weak 2 cost card. Mixing Caro means Embryos which are 30 Aliemus Cards for 0 cost, and give 10% Crit Rate. Her Rouse gives you “Scions” which are upgraded effects of Embryos. Her Exalt can be used with Fauxborn Burst turn by duplicating Fauxborn’s 3 cost, or you can dup her 2 cost Aliemus Battery and accelerate Fauxborn Exalt.

Arc 2 Fauxborn will most likely be full Lemurians or 3 Lemurians mixed w/ a overpowered support(or Murphy because synergy) 

Fauxborn + 2-3 Lemurian + 0-1 OP Support

Lemurian: Tulu/Miryiam/Goliath/Faros
OP Supp: Clem/Thais/Ryker/Hameln/Horla
Synergy: Murphy
You will want a battery so having Miryiam or Thais would help tremendously with more Fauxborn Exalts to maintain Sacrifice(Winkle can work theoretically <:JenkinsShrug:1439396974767112262> )

Kath:
CoV: Paradox/Feast from Afar/Crimsum Pulse
Golden Limited WoDs: Horla Sig/Tawil Sig/Kath Sig/Pollux Sig
Golden Standard WoDs: +12 Titan’s Blade + Alva Sig
Purple WoDs: Land of Nonexistence, or To My Dearest Friend

Budget
Chaos: Ogier/Ramona/Karen
Ultra: Tinct/Winkle

Invest:
Chaos: TRamona/Ryker/Inferno
Ultra: Clem/Horla/Castor

Ham is mandatory, ram is maybe not absolutely needed but is almost mandatory.

whats hameln good at? Can i use him with my dps liz
Hameln is good for 2 things:his rouse and his 3 cost card that can be played for free. The free card gives 2 insight and str basically pot of greed.
His rouse allows you to double play card every 2 turns. By raising and reducing cost.
He can also provide str down but it's not huge. His exalt also double plays card and can reduce cost by 2 at e2 which is recommended for arc 2
